raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.5": 4,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the load-bearing concept (the 'sqrt(n) improvement' claim), shows where the draft drifts from it (under-justification of the sqrt(n) term and the direction of the Dobrushin bound), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.5": "Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the order of presentation and grouping related issues together.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence (the need to verify Lemma 1 and Theorem 2, the citations from memory).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (misapplication of the Wilkinson model to a normalized iteration, under-specified experiments, and several prose issues).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (the suggested rewrite of the second paragraph)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the load-bearing concept (the 'sqrt(n) improvement' claim), shows where the draft drifts from it (under-justification of the sqrt(n) term and the direction of the Dobrushin bound), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the order of presentation and grouping related issues together.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence (the need to verify Lemma 1 and Theorem 2, the citations from memory).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (misapplication of the Wilkinson model to a normalized iteration, under-specified experiments, and several prose issues).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (the suggested rewrite of the second paragraph).
